'''Tih Qiqah''' was a member of the [[Shaper caste]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. A [[Master Shaper]], Qiqah was assigned to the ''[[Baanu Miir]]'' in his final years. However, either by senility or sheer greed, Qiqah did not teach any [[Shaper Adept|Adepts]] during his final years. One Initiate he trained, [[Suung Aruh]], was forced to tell the master crèche-tales with adult overtones. Tih Qiqah died shortly after the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] began, and was replaced as lead shaper of the ''Baanu Miir'' by [[Nen Yim]]—then a mere [[Shaper Adept|Adept]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' {{1stm}}
